description:
Two changes that must land together:

1. **IR rewrite**: walk every spec body, rewrite `Term::CallClosure(v, args, cont)` → `Term::Call(F, args, cont)` and `TailCallClosure(v, args)` → `TailCall(F, args)` when `fn_constants[v] = F`.
2. **Typer MakeClosure suppression**: in the queried-set walk, skip registering F's any-key from `MakeClosure(F, [])` when the closure-var is "resolvable" (every use is at a safe slot: closure operand of CallClosure/TailCallClosure, or arg slot of a Term::Call/TailCall to a known callee).

The two go together because the codegen path through the closure header's typed stub still queries F's any-key. Suppression alone breaks tests; rewrite alone leaves a dead any-key. Together, codegen bypasses the stub for resolvable closures, and .29.12.6's drop logic eliminates the unused any-key.

Depends on .29.10.1 (fn_constants), .29.10.2 (narrow spec registration).

## Scope

- New module `src/ir_rewrite.rs` (or in-place in `ir_typer`) exposing `pub fn rewrite_known_target_closures(module: &mut Module, types: &ModuleTypes)`.
- Per-spec: read `ft.fn_constants`, walk blocks, rewrite terminators. Module mutation is per-FnIr block terminator.
- Driver wires the rewrite after `type_module`, before codegen.
- `src/ir_typer.rs` queried-set walk: add escape analysis, skip MakeClosure any-key registration for resolvable closure-vars. Helper `prim_var_uses` (added in .29.10.2) does the Var-iteration.

## Tests (TDD)

- `closure_call_rewritten_to_direct_call`: apply2's specialized body has `Term::Call(double, …)`, no `Term::CallClosure`.
- `tailcall_closure_variant_rewritten`: same for `TailCallClosure`.
- `flip_higher_order_callee_test`: rename `higher_order_callee_keeps_any_key_for_fn_as_value` → `…_drops_any_key`; assert any-key ABSENT.
- Full suite + parity fixtures stay green.

## Out of scope

- Multi-target rewrite (fn_constants would be a Set<FnId>): separate ticket.
- Closure-arg propagation into lambda body (so `args` to CallClosure can also be safe-slot for fn-constant closures): separate ticket.
title: IR rewrite known-target CallClosure to direct Call
